name: Apptainer MPI On Slurm
summary: Run MPI applications from Apptainer containers inside Slurm allocations.
description: This skill provides conservative Slurm templates for launching MPI applications in Apptainer or Singularity containers, including hybrid MPI and host-MPI bind model checks.

tools.name: apptainer
tools.notes: Singularity can be substituted on sites that still expose the older command name.

tools.name: sbatch
tools.notes: Used to submit the example Slurm batch scripts.

tools.name: srun
tools.notes: Used by the hybrid MPI Slurm example when the site recommends Slurm-native launch.

tools.name: mpirun
tools.notes: Used by the bind-model example when the site recommends host MPI launch.

inputs.name: image
inputs.description: SIF image containing the MPI application and compatible runtime libraries.

inputs.name: container_command
inputs.description: Application command or binary path to execute inside the container.

inputs.name: mpi_model
inputs.description: Hybrid MPI or bind-model MPI approach approved for the target site.

inputs.name: binds
inputs.description: Host directories, MPI libraries, data paths, and scratch paths to bind into the container.

outputs.name: container_mpi_job
outputs.description: A Slurm batch script for launching MPI ranks through Apptainer with explicit binds and runtime checks.

outputs.name: preflight_report
outputs.description: A short compatibility report showing host MPI, container MPI, image metadata, and intended launch model.

examples.title: Launch a hybrid MPI container job with Slurm
Launch a bind-model MPI container job with host MPI
Inspect host and container MPI assumptions

tests.description: Validate the manifest and required artifacts.
Check that the shell examples parse.
Run mpi-preflight.sh with a site-approved image, then submit one small two-node or single-node smoke test using the launch method recommended by local support.
